marketState: neutral-to-bullish: extreme forecast heat vs a bearish storage overhang
summary: Price ($2.91) sits almost exactly at fair value ($2.923) today, so there is no clean mispricing edge right now. The most striking signal is weather: the 8-16 day demand outlook is +29.1% vs the 5-year norm and above the historical max range, while 1-7D demand is warm (+10.9%) but still within normal range. Seasonality is a weak headwind - price is 7.7pp below its typical seasonal path and the odds of higher prices in 3-4 weeks are only 38-38%, but reliability is flagged Low (59pp spread), so it shouldn't dominate. Storage is +180 Bcf above the 5-year average with a bearish build surprise (+22 Bcf vs forecast), capping the upside case even with hot weather. Managed money is net short at just the 8th percentile of 5 years, an extreme skew that raises the odds of a short-covering squeeze if the heat verifies; futures curve data was unavailable in this snapshot.

longTerm.rationale: 8-16D weather demand is +29.1% vs 5y and above the max historical range, and the fair-value model is already drifting up to $3.08 by +21D while front is only 'fair' to 'slightly under'. Managed money net short at just the 8th percentile of 5y adds contrarian upside skew (squeeze risk). Storage's +180 Bcf surplus and bearish build surprise are the main offsetting factor, keeping conviction medium rather than high.
longTerm.invalidation: 8-16D heat forecast cools back toward normal, storage surprises keep running bearish/larger, or price closes below $2.70 confirming a break of the fair-value support zone.

shortTerm.rationale: Price is essentially at fair value ($2.911 vs $2.923, spread -$0.012, status FAIR) so there is no near-term mispricing edge, and technicals conflict across timeframes - 15m leans bullish (RSI 52, EMA 50>200) while 4h/1d/1w remain bearish (EMA 50<200, RSI high-30s to high-40s, negative MACD). 1-7D weather demand is elevated (+10.9% vs 5y) but still within normal range, not extreme enough to force a near-term move, and futures curve data was unavailable to confirm term structure.
shortTerm.trigger: Wait for either a 1d/4h trend flip (EMA 50>200 cross, MACD histogram turning positive) confirming momentum aligns with the bullish weather/COT case, or a pullback toward $2.75-$2.80 for a lower-risk long entry; alternatively a confirmed break below ~$2.70 for a short-term short.
